seo.title: You've Got Mail! - Official Presskit
seo.description: Offical presskit for You've Got Mail!, a mobile idle game set during the dawn of the modern internet and e-commerce. Build a criminal empire from a basement dial-up connection through the Y2K panic and dot-com crash of the early 2000s.
seo.keywords: mobile game, idle game, clicker game, Y2K, dot-com bubble, 1990s internet, cybercrime, hacking game, Windows 98, incremental game, strategy game, simulation game, retro gaming, indie game, press kit
